title: Many Super Items
description: This project adds  super items without changing any of the vanilla aspects
body:
### ✨ Many Super Items: The Ultimate Power Upgrade


🛡️ Beyond Diamond and Netherite
Are you looking for that extra edge in your Minecraft world? Many Super Items is a Vanilla+ style mod designed for players who need more power without changing the core feel of the game. Whether you are playing a challenging adventure or a hardcore horror pack, this mod provides the high-tier equipment you need to survive.


💎 Mod Features


💠 Super Ingot – The core material of the mod. This isn't your average resource; you won't find it just by mining in caves. You must discover the unique way to obtain it!

⚔️ Super Tools – A full suite of tools (Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe) that are faster and more durable than any vanilla material.

🛡️ Super Armor – High-protection armor sets built to withstand hits from the most dangerous monsters, like the Goatman or the Boiled One.

⚖️ Balanced Gameplay – This project adds super items without changing any of the vanilla aspects, ensuring it fits perfectly into any modpack.


#     🌑 Perfect for Horror & Adventure
When the night gets darker and the monsters get stronger, standard gear isn't enough. Many Super Items is the perfect companion for:

Horror Modpacks: Survive longer against terrifying entities.

Boss Hunting: Take down the strongest bosses with ease.

End-Game Progression: Give yourself a new goal after Netherite.

# 🛠️ Technical Details
Platforms: Fully supports NeoForge.

Compatibility: Designed for Minecraft 1.21.1.

Modpacks: You are free to include this in any modpack!

# ⚠️ How to start?
Since Super Ingot is not found in caves, make sure to check your recipes to see how to craft or find these elite items. Stay safe and enjoy the power!


# enjoy this mod
